mapper.select: SELECT id, title, type, target, CASE WHEN status = 'ENABLED' THEN '启用' WHEN status = 'DRAFT' THEN '草稿' ELSE '停用' END AS status, sort_no, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updated_at FROM admin_operation_config ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_operation_config (title, type, target, status, sort_no) VALUES (#{title}, #{type}, #{target}, #{status}, #{sortNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_operation_config SET title = #{title}, type = #{type}, target = #{target}, status = #{status}, sort_no = #{sortNo} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, artist_name AS name, '' AS city, COALESCE(style_tags, '') AS tags, COALESCE(work_count, 0) AS works, CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN '上线' ELSE '下线' END AS status, id AS sort FROM artist_profile ORDER BY is_signed DESC, id DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (user_no, nickname, avatar_url, gender, status, register_source, invitation_code_used, last_login_at) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{gender}, #{status}, #{registerSource}, #{invitationCodeUsed}, #{lastLoginAt})
INSERT INTO artist_profile (user_id, artist_name, real_name, style_tags, work_count, is_signed, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{name}, #{tags}, #{works}, 0, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE artist_profile SET artist_name = #{name}, real_name = #{name}, style_tags = #{tags}, work_count = #{works}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS id, a.artist_id AS artistId, a.title AS name, ap.artist_name AS artist, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(a.current_price, 2)) AS price, COALESCE(a.inventory_available, 0) AS stock, CASE WHEN a.status = 'PUBLISHED' THEN '上架' WHEN a.status = 'COLLECTED' THEN '已收藏' WHEN a.status = 'SOLD_OUT' THEN '售罄' ELSE '下架' END AS status, '无' AS tag, COALESCE(a.description, '') AS description FROM artwork a LEFT JOIN artist_profile ap ON ap.id = a.artist_id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO artwork ( artwork_no, artist_id, title, category, style, description, base_price, current_price, inventory_total, inventory_available, status, published_at ) VALUES ( #{tag}, #{artistId}, #{name}, 'OTHER', '后台录入', #{description}, #{price}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{stock}, #{status}, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PUBLISHED' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END )
mapper.update: UPDATE artwork SET artist_id = #{artistId}, title = #{name}, description = #{description}, base_price = #{price}, current_price = #{price}, inventory_available = #{stock}, inventory_total = #{stock}, status = #{status}, published_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PUBLISHED' AND published_at IS NULL THEN NOW() WHEN #{status} != 'PUBLISHED' THEN NULL ELSE published_at END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE shipment_order SET logistics_company = #{company}, logistics_code = NULL, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, shipment_status = 'SHIPPED', consigned_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shipment_order (order_id, shipment_no, shipment_type, logistics_company, logistics_code, tracking_no, shipment_status, consigned_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, CONCAT('SHIP', #{orderId}), 'ARTWORK', #{company}, NULL, #{trackingNo}, 'SHIPPED', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT nickname, user_no AS userNo, CASE gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END AS gender, CASE WHEN status = 'ENABLED' THEN '正常' ELSE '禁用' END AS status, DATE_FORMAT(last_login_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS lastLogin FROM user_account ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT o.id AS id, o.order_no AS orderNo, COALESCE(u.nickname, CONCAT('用户#', o.buyer_user_id)) AS user, COALESCE(oi.item_title, '-') AS artwork, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(o.pay_amount, 2)) AS amount, CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' THEN '待支付' WHEN o.order_status = 'PAID' THEN '已支付' WHEN o.order_status = 'WAIT_DELIVER' THEN '待发货' WHEN o.order_status = 'DELIVERED' THEN '已发货' WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN '已完成' WHEN o.order_status = 'CANCELLED' THEN '已取消' WHEN o.order_status = 'REFUNDING' THEN '退款中' WHEN o.order_status = 'REFUNDED' THEN '已退款' ELSE o.order_status END AS status, CASE WHEN o.payment_status = 'UNPAID' THEN '待支付' WHEN o.payment_status = 'PAID' THEN '已支付' WHEN o.payment_status = 'PARTIAL_REFUND' THEN '部分退款' WHEN o.payment_status = 'REFUNDED' THEN '已退款' ELSE o.payment_status END AS payStatus, CASE WHEN COALESCE(so.shipment_status, 'TO_BE_SHIPPED') = 'TO_BE_SHIPPED' THEN '未发货' WHEN so.shipment_status = 'SHIPPED' THEN '已发货' WHEN so.shipment_status = 'SIGNED' THEN '已签收' WHEN so.shipment_status = 'EXCEPTION' THEN '异常' ELSE COALESCE(so.shipment_status, '未发货') END AS shipStatus FROM trade_order o LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = o.buyer_user_id LEFT JOIN trade_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s.* FROM shipment_order s INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(id) AS id FROM shipment_order GROUP BY order_id ) latest ON latest.id = s.id ) so ON so.order_id = o.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 100
